title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Creative Writing Path Completion → Un
content:
✔ Creative Writing Path Completion → Unlocks “Literary Artisan” title and extra discussion skip.
✔ Catharsis Path Completion → Unlocks “Self-Reflective Sage” title and ability to revise one past journal entry for a higher grade.
✔ In-Class Activity Completion → Unlocks “Master Collaborator” title and bonus discussion participation credit.

✅ Why This Works:
• Creates natural incentives beyond just grades.
• Allows customization and personal investment.
• Rewards engagement in different learning styles.

3️⃣ Weekly Structure Naming Convention (Finalized)

Each week follows a Meta Title → Subheading → Week Number

📖 Meta Title: The Evolution of Storytelling & Medium
💡 Subheading: Week 4 – The Gothic Mind: Fear, Obsession, & the Psychology of Horror
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 26 (chunk 26/555)
